relevant_processes.Name: powershell.exe
relevant_processes.CommandLine:
"C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8;
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop';$src=(git rev-parse --show-toplevel).Trim();$mirror='E:\_public_repo_mirror\WorkFLOW';$branch=(git -C $src branch --show-current).Trim();$head=(git -C $src rev-parse HEAD).Trim();$status=@(git -C $src status --short);$sourceFiles=(Get-ChildItem $src -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\.git(\\|$)' });$sourceDirs=(Get-ChildItem $src -Recurse -Directory -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\.git(\\|$)' });$mirrorFiles=(Get-ChildItem $mirror -Recurse -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue);$mirrorDirs=(Get-ChildItem $mirror -Recurse -Directory -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue);$runtimePath=Join-Path $src 'setup_reports/public_runtime_state.json';$runtime=$null;if(Test-Path $runtimePath){$runtime=Get-Content -Raw $runtimePath | ConvertFrom-Json};$procList=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'powershell|python|ssh|robocopy|cloudflared' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'public_mirror|_public_repo_mirror|localhost.run|http.server|sync_repo_to_public_mirror|fast_resume_public_mirror|start_public_mirror_watch|start_public_mirror_web|start_public_mirror_public_access' } | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,ParentProcessId,CommandLine; $obj=[ordered]@{ checked_at_utc=(Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('o'); source_repo_path=$src; mirror_path=$mirror; branch=$branch; head_commit=$head; git_status=[ordered]@{ clean=($status.Count -eq 0); changed_count=$status.Count; porcelain=@($status)}; source_stats=[ordered]@{ files=$sourceFiles.Count; directories=$sourceDirs.Count; size_bytes=[int64](($sourceFiles|Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum)}; mirror_stats=[ordered]@{ files=$mirrorFiles.Count; directories=$mirrorDirs.Count; size_bytes=[int64](($mirrorFiles|Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum)}; active_sync_entrypoint='tools/public_mirror/fast_resume_public_mirror.ps1'; fast_resume_entrypoint='tools/public_mirror/fast_resume_public_mirror.ps1'; manual_sync_entrypoint='tools/public_mirror/sync_repo_to_public_mirror.ps1'; runtime_state_path='setup_reports/public_runtime_state.json'; runtime_state=$runtime; relevant_processes=$procList }; $jsonPath=Join-Path $src 'setup_reports/server_sync_current_state.json'; $mdPath=Join-Path $src 'setup_reports/server_sync_current_state.md'; $obj | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content -Path $jsonPath -Encoding UTF8; $md=@('# Server Sync Current State','',('- checked_at_utc: {0}' -f $obj.checked_at_utc),('- source_repo_path: {0}' -f $obj.source_repo_path),('- mirror_path: {0}' -f $obj.mirror_path),('- branch: {0}' -f $obj.branch),('- head_commit: {0}' -f $obj.head_commit),('- git_status_clean: {0}' -f $obj.git_status.clean),('- git_status_changed_count: {0}' -f $obj.git_status.changed_count),('- source_files: {0}' -f $obj.source_stats.files),('- source_directories: {0}' -f $obj.source_stats.directories),('- source_size_bytes: {0}' -f $obj.source_stats.size_bytes),('- mirror_files: {0}' -f $obj.mirror_stats.files),('- mirror_directories: {0}' -f $obj.mirror_stats.directories),('- mirror_size_bytes: {0}' -f $obj.mirror_stats.size_bytes),('- active_sync_entrypoint: {0}' -f $obj.active_sync_entrypoint),('- fast_resume_entrypoint: {0}' -f $obj.fast_resume_entrypoint),('- manual_sync_entrypoint: {0}' -f $obj.manual_sync_entrypoint),'','## Relevant Processes','','```json',($obj.relevant_processes | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8),'```'); Set-Content -Path $mdPath -Value $md -Encoding UTF8; 'STATE_REPORT_WRITTEN'"
